description: Composition Cream kurta with red and black traditional print, made of 100% cotton, has a V-neck with a yoke, short sleeves, printed tape border on the sleeves and yoke, and has a vented hem Fitting Regular Wash care Wash cold using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations This elegant kurta from vishudh speaks volumes of your class and exudes femininity with its timeless design and cut. The traditional print is sure to make this a wardrobe favourite. Pair it with leggings and skinny jeans. Model statistics The model wears size M in kurtas Height: 5'7"; Chest: 33"; Waist: 25"
